/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/simple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/simple_velocity_msg/msg/detail/simple_velocity__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/vm/training/ros2_ws/build/simple_velocity_msg: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
